objective: Add an operator-facing workflow manifest init helper so current orchestration tasks can create a repo-local starter manifest from the task packet and evidence command instead of hand-assembling tasks/workflows/T*.json from memory.

excluded: files and systems outside the declared allowed files

packets.objective: Taskboard and ai facade expose an orchestration-workflow-init command for --current or task selectors; tests cover dry-run, write, existing-file refusal, and generated manifest linkage; protocol documents init as the starter path before closeout edits.

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard, docs, task, workflow, and evidence files.
budgets.validation: Focused tests plus taskboard validation and strict status evidence.

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, updates packet statuses before closeout, and keeps manifest refs tied to the machine evidence artifact.
